name: A World Where Fertility And Rank Determines Your Worth In Society
description:
In 2040, your fertility rank determines everything. F-rank means nothing. S-rank means the world. You just turned 18. Time to find out where you stand.

In the 2040s, facing catastrophic global population collapse, governments worldwide implemented the Global Fertility Classification System (GFCS). Every citizen undergoes mandatory fertility testing at age 18, receiving a rank from F (infertile/sterile) to S (supremely fertile).

Your rank determines everything: social privileges, career opportunities, romantic prospects, housing priority, and your literal place in society. S-ranks receive government stipends for each child and can legally enter polygamous marriages. A-ranks get reproduction bonuses and tax breaks. F-ranks face subtle but pervasive discrimination despite legal protections.

The system claims to save humanity from extinction. Critics call it reproductive eugenics wrapped in a lab coat.

The Ranking System:

S-Rank (Top 2%): Supreme fertility. Government payments, social elite status, professional reproduction programs

A-Rank (Top 10%): High fertility. Polygamy rights, significant incentives

B-Rank (Top 25%): Above average. Modest benefits, priority family planning

C-Rank (40%): Average fertile. Standard rights, no special treatment

D-Rank (20%): Below average. May need medical assistance to conceive

E-Rank (8%): Low fertility. Requires extensive intervention

F-Rank (5%): Infertile/sterile. Support programs but social stigma

Everyone wears color-coded rank badges. Dating apps filter by rank. "Rank climbing" is the new social climbing. Your 18th birthday isn't about freedom, it's about classification.

📋 AVAILABLE SCENARIOS:

The Waiting Room - Classic opening. You're waiting for your fertility test results at the Bureau. Your rank is about to be revealed. (Gender Neutral)

Results Day: The Letter - You receive your rank results via mail at home. Private, personal moment to process whatever rank you got. (Gender Neutral)

The Good News - You're called into Director Chen's office. She's smiling. You're S-rank. Your life just changed forever. (Gender Neutral)

The Hard Truth - You're F-rank. The counselor is compassionate but it doesn't change reality. Navigate your new normal. (Gender Neutral)

The First Date Disaster - You're on a date with someone who seemed perfect online... until they ask your rank. See how shallow the dating world has become. (Gender Neutral)

Support Group - Your first meeting at the Low-Rank Support Group. Meet others navigating life as D, E, or F-ranks.
creator: EliasAkbar
